title: Implement: TX queue with priority (all implementations)
description: Policy: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md §3 TX Queue. Currently MISSING in Rust/Zephyr/Python. Implement: 4 packets max, 4 priority levels (0=routing, 1=ACK, 2=urgent, 3=bulk), deadline expiry, preemption.
notes:
Audit complete. TX queue state:

**Rust**: Partial implementation in rust/lichen-core/src/tx_queue.rs - has priority queue but wrong capacity (32 vs spec 4), no deadline expiry, no preemption.

**Python**: Missing entirely - link_layer.py sends directly to radio.

**C/Zephyr**: Missing entirely - lichen_link_tx.c has no queue.

Filed sub-beads:
- a4n2.1: Rust fixes (capacity, deadline, preemption)
- a4n2.2: Python implementation
- a4n2.3: C/Zephyr implementation
close_reason: Audit complete: TX queue MISSING in Python and C/Zephyr, PARTIAL in Rust (wrong capacity, no deadline/preemption). Filed 3 sub-beads: a4n2.1 (Rust fixes), a4n2.2 (Python impl), a4n2.3 (C/Zephyr impl). Work decomposed for implementation.
